blockers.evidence: All stacked PRs through the selected candidate are merged to main in order.
Maintainer records the exact commit SHA that will receive the annotated source tag.
Maintainer runs scripts/source-release-preflight.ps1 -RequireTag without -SkipTestCommands on the exact annotated tag.
Maintainer reviews the release evidence bundle, preflight summary, proof manifest, and rendered release notes.
Release notes state feature status, known limitations, source proof, and no binary/store/trusted-signing claims.
Release copy confirms no APK, EXE, store release, trusted signing, official binary, or production support claim.
Maintainer confirms Free VPN catalog remains gated third-party opt-in and diagnostics exports remain local-only, user-initiated, and redacted.
